benefit_text:
Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation (see additional instructions below).
Dates: This pass is available for the following 2026 dates and ferries:
Georges Island:        May 15-June 14: Thursday through Sunday      June 16-September 1: Daily
Spectacle Island:        July 15-September 1: Daily      September 4-21: Thursday through Sunday      September 26-October 13: Friday through Sunday
Peddocks Island (from Hingham):      June 15-September 7: Daily except Tuesday      September 10-October 12: Thursday through Sunday
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 4 people at 50% off per person.
source_phrases: Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation (see additional instructions below).
Dates: This pass is available for the following 2026 dates and ferries:
Georges Island:        May 15-June 14: Thursday through Sunday      June 16-September 1: Daily
Spectacle Island:        July 15-September 1: Daily      September 4-21: Thursday through Sunday      September 26-October 13: Friday through Sunday
Peddocks Island (from Hingham):      June 15-September 7: Daily except Tuesday      September 10-October 12: Thursday through Sunday
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 4 people at 50% off per person.

Additional Instructions: -Pre-registration is required. Visit the Boston Harbor Islands website to reserve. -When purchasing your ticket, expand the “Enter Gift Card, Promo Code, or Redeem Points” option and enter the e-code into the “Coupon/Voucher Code” field.
